rules.name: Variable is declared but never used
Encryption algorithms should be used with secure mode and padding scheme
Exceptions should be either logged or rethrown but not both
Value type property used as input in a controller action should be nullable, required or annotated with the JsonRequiredAttribute to avoid under-posting.
"catch" clauses should do more than rethrow
Types should be named in PascalCase
General or reserved exceptions should never be thrown
Sections of code should not be commented out
Unused local variables should be removed
Boolean expressions should not be gratuitous
Double quote to prevent globbing and word splitting
Non-nullable field must contain a non-null value when exiting constructor. Consider adding the 'required' modifier or declaring as nullable.
The type cannot be used as type parameter in the generic type or method. Nullability of type argument doesn't match 'class' constraint.
Database passwords should not be disclosed
Use model binding instead of reading raw request data
